description_long: This object is a rectangular wooden crate with a visibly weathered texture, featuring vertical slats on its sides and top. The front and back panels are framed with a recessed border, while the longer sides display a diagonal wooden plank for added structural support. The wood grain is prominent, giving the crate a rustic, utilitarian appearance suitable for storage or transport. The crate appears to be hollow inside, as is typical for such containers, and there are no visible handles or openings. Its construction suggests durability and the ability to support moderate weight on its flat surfaces.
description: A weathered, rectangular wooden crate with vertical slats and diagonal support planks, designed for storage or transport. The crate has a rustic, utilitarian look and appears sturdy.
description_view_0: The end of the crate is visible, showing a framed rectangular panel with vertical slats and no diagonal support.
description_view_1: The long side of the crate is shown, featuring vertical slats and a prominent diagonal wooden support plank.
description_view_2: The opposite end of the crate, similar to view 0, with a framed panel and vertical slats but no diagonal support.
description_view_3: The other long side of the crate, mirroring view 1, with vertical slats and a diagonal support plank.
